message:
fix: persist snoozed card state to localStorage and auto-clean expired entries (#5137)

Snoozed cards used in-memory-only storage, causing snooze state to be
lost on page refresh. This fix:

- Persists snoozed card swaps to localStorage (was in-memory only)
- Persists snoozed recommendations to localStorage with expiry support
- Adds periodic timer to auto-clean expired snooze entries (every 60s)
- Adds isCardSnoozed() helper for checking snooze status by card ID
- Replaces Date objects with numeric timestamps for JSON serialization
- Replaces magic number 3600000 with named ONE_HOUR_MS constant
- Updates tests to cover persistence, expiry, and auto-cleanup

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
